metadata.title: Modulation Depth Range RPN
metadata.summary: MIDI specification document: Modulation Depth Range RPN.

description: title: Modulation Depth Range RPN protocol: midi1 source: .midi-raw-data/Modulation Depth Range RPN – MIDI.org.html sourceType: local sha256: c6cd4ded78ccb7454d97bbb1fd58e133644066b7208e898cd18503c63baf6d03 extractedAt: 2026-07-16T12:54:07.579Z summary: MIDI specification document: Modulation Depth Range RPN. --- This proposal defines Registered Parameter Number (RPN) #05 as Modulation Depth Range to be used to scale the effective range of Control Change 1 (Modulation Wheel). ca26 RPN05 Modulation Depth Range.pdf This proposal defines Registered Parameter Number (RPN) #05 as Modulation Depth Range to be used to scale the effective range of Control Change 1 (Modulation Wheel). The correlation between Modulation Depth Range values and modulation depth is defined by individual manufacturers or MMA/AMEI recommended practices.
